<available_tools>
- search: Search the knowledge base for documents matching a query.
  args_schema: {"properties":{"limit":{"type":"integer"},"query":{"type":"string"}},"required":["query"],"type":"object"}
  side_effects: read
  examples:
    - broadest search → {"query":"quarterly revenue"}
    - bounded result set → {"limit":5,"query":"revenue"}

- ping: Health-check the upstream service.
  side_effects: pure
</available_tools>
